summary: Client Unread Message Counter Feature - ALL TESTS PASSED. Backend API tests (12/12 passed) verified unread_count field in ticket responses, mark-read endpoint authorization, and proper 403/404 error handling. Frontend UI verified unread badges display with red background, badge reset on ticket click, and correct rendering of all ticket elements.
seed_data_creation: No test data created - used existing production tickets for testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: Client unread message counter feature fully tested. Key endpoints: POST /api/v1/tickets/{id}/mark-read (client-side, requires ticket ownership), GET /api/v1/tickets (returns unread_count field). Frontend displays red badges with data-testid='unread-badge-{ticket_id}', shows '9+' for counts > 9, resets badge when ticket is clicked via handleSelectTicket function calling mark-read API.
